metadata.title: The BX3 Framework: A Universal Architecture for Accountable Autonomous Systems
metadata.description: The BX3 Framework introduces a three-layer architecture — Purpose Layer, Bounds Engine, and Fact Layer — for building accountable autonomous systems. This paper demonstrates that the framework is actor-agnostic (any entity may occupy any layer), establishes the upstream accountability guarantee (systems fail upward into human consciousness), and shows the pattern is universal across legal systems, medicine, autonomous vehicles, biological cognition, and organizational design. Five named pillars operationalize the framework: Loop Isolation, Recursive Spawning, Spatial Firewall, Sandbox Gate, and Bailout Protocol.

title: The BX3 Framework: A Universal Architecture for Accountable Autonomous Systems
